mapper.sql: id, stock_code, title, title_zh, link, pub_date_gmt, pub_date_bj, tags
mapper.insert: insert into us_stock_rss (stock_code, title, title_zh, link, pub_date_gmt, pub_date_bj, tags) values (#{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pubDateGmt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pubDateBj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into us_stock_rss
stock_code,
title,
title_zh,
link,
pub_date_gmt,
pub_date_bj,
tags,
#{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{titleZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{link,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pubDateGmt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{pubDateBj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update us_stock_rss
stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title_zh = #{titleZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link = #{link,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pub_date_gmt = #{pubDateGmt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pub_date_bj = #{pubDateBj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
tags = #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update us_stock_rss set stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title_zh = #{titleZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link = #{link,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pub_date_gmt = #{pubDateGmt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pub_date_bj = #{pubDateBj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, tags = #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
